LANCASTER EMA REPORTED 3 SEPARATE EPISODES OF HAIL. GOLF BALL SIZED HAIL OCCURRED 615-630 PM. 1.5 TO 2.0 INCH HAIL OCCURRED 710-720 PM. PEA TO MARBLE SIZED OCCURRED 730-740 PM. HAIL WAS COVERING THE GROUND. ALSO THERE WAS A TREE KNOCKED DOWN BY THE STORM AT THE INTERSECTION OF SC HWY 903 NORTH AND MUSKET ROAD AT 720 PM. THE STORMS MAINLY MOVED ALONG THE SC HWY 9 CORRIDOR.

A NWS STORM SURVEY FOUND AND EF0 TORNADO IN EASTERN CLARENDON COUNTY. THE PATH CONSISTED OF INTERMITTENT TOUCHDOWNS THAT WAS A LENGTH OF 5 MILES. THE WIDTH RANGED FROM 20 TO 40 YARDS. THE DAMAGE CONSISTED OF DOWNED TREES. THE TORNADO FORMED NEAR BREWINGTON AND CROW BAY RD WHERE THE INITIAL DAMAGE WAS OBSERVED. THE TORNADO TRAVELED NORTHEAST AND PRODUCED ADDITIONAL DAMAGE ALONG HOWARD RD. THE LAST AREA OF DAMAGE WAS NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF HICKORY HILL RD AND NEWMAN BRANCH RD.
